title: Minecraft Enhanced
description: TournamentStrike's own modpack, focusing on Exploration with a Vanilla+ feel; curated by the community, for the community; Taking suggestions, additions, from our players.. While the pack is specifically curated for our server(s), all are welcome to use.
body:
TournamentStrike's own modpack, focusing on Exploration with a Vanilla+ feel; curated by the community, for the community; Taking suggestions, additions, from our players.. While the pack is specifically curated for our server(s), all are welcome to use.

⚠  We are still adding, tweaking and expanding the pack, some mods may be removed or added.

✔️  Curated By Players, For Players

✔️  Exploration Focussed Additions
